passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This coupon code gives a 50% discount for the 202 Boston Harbor Ferry season for the following islands and dates:
Georges Island
May 15- June 15: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16- September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
July 15 - September 1: every day
source_phrases: This coupon code gives a 50% discount for the 202 Boston Harbor Ferry season for the following islands and dates:
Georges Island
May 15- June 15: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16- September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
July 15 - September 1: every day
September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays
September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island
June 15 - September 7: every day but Tuesdays
September 10- October 12: Thursdays through Sundays

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
Free admission for up to 4 people. At least one 1 must bring proof of MA residence.
This pass can be used at the following location: Harvard Museum of Natural History, The Peabody Museum of Archeology and Ethnology, The Harvard Museum of the Near East, or the The Collection of Historical Scientific Instruments

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 people at $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free. In addition to presenting your coupon at the museum, you must reserve your tickets online at  https://tnew.gardnermuseum.org/events
Pass does not guarantee entry.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people at $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free. In addition to presenting your coupon at the museum, you must reserve your tickets online at  https://tnew.gardnermuseum.org/events
Pass does not guarantee entry.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass must be returned at the Chelsea Public Library the day after use.
Free parking for 1 vehicle at state park facilities that charge a parking fee.
source_phrases: Pass must be returned at the Chelsea Public Library the day after use.
Free parking for 1 vehicle at state park facilities that charge a parking fee.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Each promo code may be redeemed for up to two adult tickets ($15 each) and four youth tickets ($10 each).  Children 6 and under are admitted for free.
Promo codes are redeemable online, over the phone, or at any MFA ticket desk. Passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any other public programs. All prices are subject to change. Discount admission may not be combined with other offers. When planning your visit, please check www.mfa.org/visit for current Museum hours and early closings. The Museum is closed on New Year’s Day, Patriots’ Day, Fourth of July, Thanksgiving, and Christmas.
source_phrases: Each promo code may be redeemed for up to two adult tickets ($15 each) and four youth tickets ($10 each).  Children 6 and under are admitted for free.

Promo codes are redeemable online, over the phone, or at any MFA ticket desk. Passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any other public programs. All prices are subject to change. Discount admission may not be combined with other offers. When planning your visit, please check www.mfa.org/visit for current Museum hours and early closings. The Museum is closed on New Year’s Day, Patriots’ Day, Fourth of July, Thanksgiving, and Christmas.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
1.  Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
2.  Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
3.  When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass, and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
4.  If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
1.  Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
2.  Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

3.  When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass, and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
4.  If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 people (adults or children) at half price per person. Children 2 and under are free.
Passes are not accepted on weekends from June-August. In the event of a closure, passes will be honored up to a week after the original printed date.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people (adults or children) at half price per person. Children 2 and under are free.
Passes are not accepted on weekends from June-August. In the event of a closure, passes will be honored up to a week after the original printed date.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
This is a physical pass that must be picked up and returned to the library.
Discounted admission for up to 6 people; $13.75 for adults and $10.75 for children.
Code on pass must be redeemed online and pass presented at the museum.
Pass not available in October.
source_phrases: This is a physical pass that must be picked up and returned to the library.
Discounted admission for up to 6 people; $13.75 for adults and $10.75 for children.
Code on pass must be redeemed online and pass presented at the museum.
Pass not available in October.

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 6 people at $9/adult and $6/child. Pass may be used at either Stoneham Zoo or Franklin Park Zoo. Passes are not date-specific so plan for any day that works for you, up to the expiration date on the pass itself.
You might consider going with another family on the same day and each family can get their own pass.
